info.title: Operations Center — Machine Engine Hours API
info.description:
Returns the **last reported** engine **hour meter** reading for a machine. Each item includes a **timestamp** for the report, the **source** of the reading, and typically a **`machine`** link for discovery. This endpoint **does not** support John Deere’s **`x-deere-signature`** / eTag optimization.

**Media type:** Use **`Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`**.

**Collections:** Responses typically follow the **CollectionPage** pattern (`total`, `links`, `values`) like other platform list APIs.

tags.name: Engine hours
tags.description: Last reported engine hour readings and report metadata for a machine.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: Three-legged OAuth 2.0 (authorization code) for John Deere Precision Tech platform APIs. This endpoint requires **`eq1`**. Request `offline_access` if you need refresh tokens. Discover endpoints from the well-known URL.

scopes.eq1: Equipment Access Level 1 — view equipment and engine hours

Link.description: Hypermedia link (`@type` **Link**). Engine hour items typically include a **`machine`** link.

EngineHoursReport.description: A single engine hours report. **Source** indicates which telematics path produced the meter reading (see product documentation for exact codes).

@type.description: Axiom resource type discriminator when present.

hourReading.description: Reported engine hours value from the meter.

readingDateTime.description: Timestamp when the reading was reported or recorded.

source.description: Origin of the meter reading. **TM** — MTG or UTG; **MIG** — Machine Information Gateway; **CI** — GTT (GlobalTracs Terminal).

EngineHoursCollectionPage.description: Paged collection of engine hour reports (**CollectionPage** pattern).

total.description: Total number of values available for this query.

values.description: Engine hours reports for this page.

get.description:
Returns the **last reported** number of hours that a machine’s **engine** has recorded. Each response item includes a **timestamp** for the report and the **source** of the report, and typically includes a **link** to the **machine** resource.

**Please note:** This API **does not** support eTags (`x-deere-signature`).

**OAuth scope:** `eq1`

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/machines/{principalId}/engineHours`

parameters.name: principalId
parameters.description: Machine **principal id** for the machine whose engine hours you are reading (from machine or equipment resources in `/platform`).

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use **`application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`** for Axiom v3 JSON responses (recommended for all calls).

200.description: Success — engine hours for the machine (typically **CollectionPage** with `values`).

collection.summary: Last reported hours with machine link

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token, expired access token, or application not licensed for the API.

403.description: Forbidden — user or client cannot access this machine or required OAuth scopes (ensure **`eq1`**) are not granted. May also indicate organization connection or terms (RCA) issues; check response headers such as **X-Deere-Warning** / **X-Deere-Terms-Location** when present.

404.description: Not found — **`principalId`** is not valid for the caller’s accessible resources.

429.description: Too many requests — honor **Retry-After** when returned.

503.description: Service unavailable — retry with backoff; honor **Retry-After** when returned.
